Class Duck

java.lang.Object
org.example.domain.Entity<Long>
org.example.domain.User
org.example.domain.Duck
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable
public class Duck extends User
Represents a Duck user in the social network. Each duck has a type, speed, and resistance.
See Also:

  • Constructor Details

    • Duck

      public Duck(Long id, String userType, String username, String email, String password, DuckType duckType, Double speed, Double resistance)
      Constructs a new Duck with the given parameters.
      Parameters:
      id - the unique identifier inherited from User
      username - the username of the Duck
      email - the email of the Duck
      password - the password of the Duck
      duckType - the type of the duck
      speed - the speed of the duck
      resistance - the resistance of the duck
